An '''[[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] [[Chief/Legends|chief]]''' was present during the [[Battle of Maridun (0 ABY)|Battle of Maridun]].

After a vicious battle with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Ziering]], he commended [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] on his valor. He forged a truce that would prove profitable for the Empire: Any captives taken by his tribe during ritual warfare would be given as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] to the Empire.

{{Char-stub}}
